title: Engine Provided Config
description: Pilot-managed provided config for the current engine service. This schema matches EngineProvidedConfig in rust/crates/zk-engine-svc/src/config.rs. Bootstrap-owned fields such as nats_url, env, engine_id, grpc_host, grpc_port, kv_heartbeat_secs, discovery_bucket, and bootstrap_token are intentionally excluded.

strategy_key.description: Logical authored strategy identity bound to this engine run.

strategy_type_key.description: Strategy implementation selector to execute, for example smoke-test, mm, or python-wrapper.

account_ids.description: Account identifiers currently bound to this engine runtime.

instruments.description: Instrument codes currently subscribed by this engine runtime.

kline_interval.description: Kline interval such as 1m or 5m. Empty string disables kline subscriptions.
